allow: Bash(xcodebuild -scheme AdorableBites -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)' build 2>&1 | grep -E '\(error:|BUILD|SUCCEEDED|FAILED\)' | head -10)
Bash(xcodebuild -project AdorableBites.xcodeproj -scheme AdorableBites -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)' build 2>&1 | tail -30)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Simulator" to activate' && sleep 1 && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke \(ASCII character 29\) using command down' && sleep 2 && xcrun simctl io "iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)" screenshot /tmp/adorable_bites_landscape.png 2>&1)

Bash(xcodebuild -project AdorableBites.xcodeproj -scheme AdorableBites -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)' build 2>&1 | tail -3 && xcrun simctl terminate "iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)" com.adorablebites.app 2>&1; xcrun simctl install "iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)" ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/AdorableBites-bwnpmrnlcnnvwbatpbtcmyhhfmaf/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/AdorableBites.app 2>&1 && xcrun simctl launch "iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)" com.adorablebites.app 2>&1 && sleep 2 && xcrun simctl io "iPad mini \(A17 Pro\)" screenshot /tmp/adorable_bites_v4.png 2>&1 && python3 -c "from PIL import Image; Image.open\('/tmp/adorable_bites_v4.png'\).rotate\(-90, expand=True\).save\('/tmp/adorable_bites_v4_rotated.png'\)")
